description: Concurrency and State Risk: Detect race conditions, improper async usage, and shared state hazards.

fixtures.notes: Property getter calls Task.Run().Result, blocking the thread-pool thread for synchronous I/O inside an async-capable MAUI app — classic deadlock anti-pattern.
GetAwaiter().GetResult() blocks the calling thread, but the overall fix reads stdout and stderr concurrently via Task.WhenAll — debatable: avoids the pipe deadlock but still blocks the outer thread.
Blocking ConfigureAwait(false).GetAwaiter().GetResult wrappers are replaced with async handlers that await task completion, reducing sync-over-async deadlock risk.
The DI factory call keeps synchronous GetAwaiter().GetResult and only adds ConfigureAwait(false); deadlock likelihood drops but sync-over-async blocking remains.
